debug_info.goal:
U V : Type
f : U → V
⊢ onto f ↔ range f = Univ V

proof:
by
  apply Iff.intro
  · intro h
    ext y
    apply Iff.intro
    · intro _
      trivial
    · intro _
      obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := h y
      exact ⟨x, hx⟩
  · intro h y
    have hy : y ∈ Univ V := trivial
    rw [← h] at hy
    exact hy
failed_attempts:
by
  apply Iff.intro
  · intro h
    apply Set.ext
    intro y
    apply Iff.intro
    · intro _
      define
    · intro _
      define
      obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := h y
      exact ⟨x, hx⟩
  · intro h y
    have hy : y ∈ Univ V := by define
    rw [← h] at hy
    define at hy
    obtain ⟨x, hx⟩ := hy
    exact ⟨x, hx⟩
